name: Trail POP
description: The Trail POP captures and retains all the points of the input for the most recent N frames or N "slices", being a time-history of the input's points. It then optionally creates primitives that connects the points in various ways. If the number of points of the input is the same for all the slices, then it can easily skin points together using the Connectivity menu, such as maling a line strip for each point over time. If the number of points is changing per-frame, as it would with a particle system, it can still connect time-related dots by using an Id attribute on the points, and making sure the Id of a particle stays the same through its life. You can select which attribute it co-relates to using the Match by Attribute parameter. It ignores and does not use the connectivity (primitives) of the input. If the number of points of the input is the same for all the slices, it adds one new [[Dimension]] whose size is the number of slices. Trail Length can be expressed in Seconds or Frames. Seconds is preferable as it will remain the same if you move the Trail POP to another project with a different frame rate. Trail Increment lets you skip frames - capture a slice every Mth frame. Reset clears and restarts the trail. Oldest Point First reverses the order of the slices. The Trail POP deals with frame drops elegantly by (optionally) filling in data for missing frames and creating stand-in slices, and (optionally) tagging each slice with an Age attribute. This can give smoother frame-drop-resistant trail curves.

parameters.name: Active
parameters.label: Active
parameters.description: When enabled, the trail POP will append the input POP to the current trails.

parameters.name: Always Cook
parameters.label: Always Cook
parameters.description: Forces the operator to cook every frame.

parameters.name: Trail Length
parameters.label: Trail Length
parameters.description: Length of trail expressed in time units.

parameters.name: Trail Increment
parameters.label: Trail Increment
parameters.description: The spacing between trail points.

parameters.name: Reset
parameters.label: Reset
parameters.description: Resets tail and holds one snapshot.

parameters.name: Age Attribute
parameters.label: Age Attribute
parameters.description: Whether to outpt an Age attribute.

parameters.name: Oldest Point First
parameters.label: Oldest Point First
parameters.description: Changes the point order: older points are first instead of last.

parameters.name: Fill Missed Frames
parameters.label: Fill Missed Frames
parameters.description: Enable frame reconstruction for dropped frames using interpolation.

parameters.name: Match by Attribute
parameters.label: Match by Attribute
parameters.description: Connect points sharing the same attribute value.

parameters.name: Attribute Name
parameters.label: Attribute Name
parameters.description: Attribute to use when connecting points by attribute.

parameters.name: Attrib is UInt
parameters.label: Attrib is UInt
parameters.description: When connecting trails by attribute, allows to specify whether the attribute is an unsigned integer and what the max value is. Smaller max UInt require fewer passes for the internal sort.

parameters.name: Max Number of Line Strips
parameters.label: Max Number of Line Strips
parameters.description: Sets the max number of line strips to be allocated. This number should be bigger than the actual number of line strips (visible in info popup) for all the trail line strips to be created.

parameters.name: Connectivity
parameters.label: Connectivity
parameters.description: Determines the primitive used to connect the points.

parameters.name: Closed
parameters.label: Closed
parameters.description: The last vertex is connected to the first vertex.

parameters.name: Transform Order
parameters.label: Transform Order
parameters.description: Sets the overall transform order for the transformations.

parameters.name: Rotate Order
parameters.label: Rotate Order
parameters.description: Sets the order of the rotations within the overall transform order.

parameters.name: Translate
parameters.label: Translate
parameters.description: Translate the points in the three axes over time.

parameters.name: Rotate
parameters.label: Rotate
parameters.description: Rotate the points around the corresponding X, Y and Z axes. Angles are given in degrees.

parameters.name: Scale
parameters.label: Scale
parameters.description: These three fields scale the Source geometry in the three axes.

parameters.name: Pivot
parameters.label: Pivot
parameters.description: The pivot point for the transform rotates and scales.
